reviews.review_description: Playing only four people at one time is fun, but the expansions would be amazing and make this game have a lot more longevity. From all of us fans who enjoy playing this game too all of the developers please please please please please add the expansions. I don’t care if it’s something you have to pay extra for we would love to have it.

this is a great version of the game, it is a lot of fun to play with friends really wish they would put the work in to get the expansions on here,  so far do not have any leg or any issues with the servers please work on getting the expansions , thanks for bringing this to vr

reviews.review_title: Great game! Need to roll out updates.
reviews.review_description: Would be nice to have DLC and game settings like points to win etc.

reviews.review_title: Awesome game in need of expansions added
reviews.review_description: The base game is fun and works well for solo play and multiplayer. It is in desperate need of having expansions added, seafarers at a minimum! You can only play the base game but so many times before it gets old.

I feel it is a good fun game with friends but it needs the expansions added too. Like seafarers, pirates and explores, cities and knights and so on. The game has a lot of potential it just needs more too it
Thank you for reading

Only had it for the day, but when playing with the AI - if you stop midway, your game swaps with the AI in front of you. Essentially, you're playing the AI's hand and the AI is playing your hand. The game is enjoyable so far. I may update the review in a few months after I tried everything. But for the issue above, I'm giving it a 2 star rating.
Wish this developer made more of these games. This one is great. We keep coming back to it.

Game is amazing

We need expansions
Would be nice to have the expansions like seafair and cities and knights

This board game brings me and my family together for "games night" in a whole different way.  It is fun to play and we always enjoy it. I wish there were more board games similar to this on the Quest headset. It is straightforward to learn and play and means we can get together and have fun without distance being a problem. Not everyone wants shooting games!  5 stars from me.

reviews.review_title: Solo play needs a 1 on 1 mode
reviews.review_description:
Otherwise, a great game very fun to play, but my only grip is this game needs a one on one mode with the AI because the AI tends to gang up on you when you’re playing and gives you very slim chance at winning when the AI is consistently getting everything it needs because the other AI just gives it the trades it wants  about 
98% of the time

reviews.review_title: Simone will Play with me? Add me or text
reviews.review_description: Simone will Play with me? Add me or text
This would be perfect if you could play in AR also please, it’s a very fun game

I'm playing on the Quest 3. The game is great when I play with 3-4 real people. The issue that I have is when I play against AI players, the game will freeze and say my memory is low (it's not). When I restart the game, I am a different player (started as red but returned as blue),  or the board images are wrong (sheep shown and given, but on restart the image now shows brick but still gives sheep). I would also like to track how many games I've won/lost. Please add expansion for more players.

Love tabletop games have a cupboards full of them,sadly, the family don't have my enthusiasm for them like i do, so I'm left playing solo. 

Always wanted to try catan, so this has satisfied my curiosity .

Great game, and I didn't realise how easy it was going to be to pick up  and play.

There are no issues with the game that I've discovered. Keep it going

We've been playing this with friends for over a year. It's terrific, but they REALLY need to upgrade this to include the expansion games. Also, it'd be really nice to allow customization options. For example, bigger boards, unique layouts, and tons of other "house rules" that people know and love. Without these, it makes the transition from physical game to virtual tough to stick with for extended periods. We're getting tired of it. Please update soon!

never played the real board game, took a while to figure out why I couldn't do some things, but once I learned ALL the rules, its a great strategy game. It seems like the real game is messy, with a lot of table clutter, a step up I think ...

BTW: Magic Table makes a VR chess game, but not for you. I would buy it if available.

Mega fun game! Many hours of fun with my group of friends. Only could do with some improvements. Catanboard game has expansions. Can't take this one to vr as well? Also the boards are basic and the 10 victory points. An option to make the board bigger and more victory points would be really nicer though. Would be a nice upgrade.

reviews.review_title: So much fun without the set up
reviews.review_description: If you like the board game you'll like the VR version. I wish you could play in mixed reality. Would be a great game to play with friends

reviews.review_title: Very poor implementation of so so game
reviews.review_description: Clunky, unintuitive point and click interface.
Would love to see the game expanded so that 6 or 8 people could play!
AI is so buggy.   CPU will trade with each other on 9 points.   If you're about to win expect to roll constant 7's.   Game is TERRIBLE.   Do not waste your $.
Great game, great tutorial 👏

I love this game! I have the 3D board and play with local friends. Many of my out-of-state friends have it and we occasionally are able to get together which helps to keep in touch. The only criticism I have is that it can be glitchy, and it’s in dire need of an update. I would hand over the money instantly if the expansions became available. I hope that it will happen, but I’ll keep playing until then, or until the glitches prove too frustrating.
Love this game… my family has been playing for awhile… we’d love more additions like the board game!

Such a fun game but the microphones are so temperamental. If you lift your headset even to sip a drink chances are your microphone will stop working or you will no longer hear other players, nearly every time. We still love it and play all the time but we all really wish the sound was reliable at least a bit.

My family LOVES this game. We would love to see Cities and Knights and Seafarers added. We all live in different areas and this game makes us feel like we can have game night for the family with a feel of sitting together. I wish we could have an expansion version to play 6 players.

Would love to se more board and card games on VR.

Ive had this game for years and love playing with my family in different states but after all these years no expansions or updates! I play on the Nintendo switch and it has every expansion and i wish this game would come out with some type of update!! Please!!
Really fun but it needs to be updated badly. Bug fixes and paid expansion boards would make it a 5 star game.
I play this game the most in VR. Great rooms and graphics and very much enjoy playing against AI. Hope they add challenges and seas like other platform game options.

It's a decent rendition of the basic game. The UI is very easy to use and everything is legible. Graphics are not very inspiring but are functional. 
Unfortunately solo play is lack lustre due to the AI never trading with you unless it's your turn. This makes the game extra hard/ boring as trading is such a huge part of it. 
The colours of the AI characters don't relate to their board pieces so good luck trying to work out who is who.

reviews.review_title: Love this game but it glitches a lot
reviews.review_description:
Bought the board game a couple of years ago, prefer the vr version. 

I wish they’d update it and add expansions. 

The game likes to glitch and put up a “played night” card when that didn’t happen. 

It would be great if you could see who was in the lobby room before going in, as there are some ride players I avoid.

Pretty nice game, I like the skill level of the AI’s.

Twice my game froze and I lost all my gameplay for that game :(

I wish you could interact more with the board.

It's a fantastic game. Great environments to choose from. Too bad the avatars are only displayed as masks. I would like to see a bit more here.
I have the problem with a friend that we can't see each other online in the game and therefore can't play together. 
It really is a lot of fun. Also the animated playing field.
I would like to see more games like this in VR that you can play together with others in a great environment. Also game of life, dog, uno and other board games.

reviews.review_title: Decent game, but no update in years
reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game, but it hasn’t been updated in years. And the AI players are totally rigged, they’ll roll three sevens in a row but yet I can’t seem to roll one seven. I feel this needs to be cheaper if it’s never gonna be updated.

Had a great time playing with friends. 
It’s the perfect application for VR and the graphics look sharp, gameplay is easy, and the environments are relaxing. 
I’d give 5 stars but it’s missing the expansions that would add so much more life and replay-ability to this game. 
I’ll certainly keep playing, but really am missing the expansion!
Keep up the good work!
Recently, the game has been freezing or crashing about every 2nd or 3rd time played. Extremely annoying.

When Catan is working properly it’s the best. Unlike the physical game, there is no set up and the game play is awesome. However, recently more times than not, the game’s operation is frustrating. There are times one is unable to create a game, invite friends, or even play online games. Sometimes, the game becomes inoperative and you have to leave the game and then reenter to resume.  The mic usually works, but not always. One can adjust the table up and down, and forward and backwards. However, there is no side to side adjustment. Sometimes there is a floating card. Maybe these issues are only for the Meta Quest 3? I still recommend the game. I hope the issues are resolved soon.

This game is so bad that there is no one to play online… since the begining.
No update, just a money trap.
it’s not interesting to play since there is only one field, and no additions. And you can't roll the dice yourself.  That's why it's not very interesting

I’m torn on reviewing this. It is apparent the developers have dropped all support on this game for awhile now., This vr game feels dated and old, obvious there has been no support for it in a long time just like the Netflix app, abandoned. 

The game itself seems ok. I found it fun when playing against someone and not the A.I.   The controls are not intuitive but easy enough to figure out after some tinkering.  Online multiplayer does not exist meaning there is no lobby. If you want to play against someone you must have friends. You cannot play against random people. 


Other reviewers are asking for updates and I see their point. Unfortunately this game has been abandoned. 

So if your thinking of time passing game that honestly is good but lacks support and players wait for it to go on sale. 

A game that’s abandoned should be free on the store!

I’ve played appx 10 games, all in private rooms with 4 players, and in 80% of those games a non insignificant glitch will happen. In most games the audio of one of the players will not but audible to the other players. On occasion someone will be booted mid game (there is no ability to return when this happens). 

This is a 5 star review if those bugs are resolved, but it almost unplayable at this point. 


Finally, player colors are impossible to tell apart. There are two shades of red and two shades of blue. They similar shades are almost identical.

Beautiful to look at and play. AI is aggressively anti solo player. You will often get robbed three, four times in  a round. Your numbers will often be dead until blocked, and the AI will rarely trade with you . Needs a screen to show the game stats.

reviews.review_title: Amazing board game brought to life
reviews.review_description: This game is truly one of the best.  You really feel immersed sitting there playing with your friends or online players. I’m giving it a 4 at the moment and maybe a possible 5 if new environments and the expansion packs are added.

Gameplay is pretty nice and faster paced than the real board game. The environments are nice. And the menu is easy to navigate.

Cons:
As others have stated, red & orange and blue & white look way too similar in 3D mode; it’s hard to tell which is which. I find myself using only the classic tiles to tell them apart better. 

I know this is new to the Quest, but it’s incredibly frustrating to find a match with people. Once you do have 4 people, they can leave at anytime  (either connection problems or they quit)- there should be an option to replace people that leave with AI. This would help with keeping the game going because of one leaves usually a second person leaves, then there’s no point to continue.

There should also be a way to adjust player mics and music. I always play with music off because it’s louder than some of the players. 


I would love to give this 5 stars, but the game needs a bit of polish.

Played a two hour game with 2 other friends and an AI. We were all seeing different versions of the board, trades were going through without removing cards from peoples hands, the robber wasnt stopping resources from being collected, and in the end the AI froze on its turn and we couldnt continue the game. There is something very wrong with this application, would not recommend.

The ability to undo is sorely needed. Accidents happen and being stuck with a misplaced road or settlement shouldn't be something a player is stuck with. Offer ability to expand board (larger .. for 5-6 players) in a 4-person game. Add ability to roll dice to determine who goes first. Tweak AI so it doesn't always pick other AI player for trades.

reviews.review_title: Want dlc options in the future
reviews.review_description: I love Catan and this is a great version of the game. I hope we can get dlc options in the future for the other versions of the game that exist. Specifically I’d love to be able to play the Star Trek version in VR. Other than that this is a great VR game.

This is great if you love catan or games with friends. Chatting and playing a classic.


Near perfect but some improvements could be made:

1) More VR interactivity. Shaking dice yourself or tapping cards

2) Expansions 

3) Simplify trading with accept, deny, counter vs having to re-build the trade to accept

4) VR new board is a little hard to see what’s going on. The classic board option in the game works just fine but a cool update could make it pop

5) More character customization and options

I'm not sure I've played a single game to completion without experiencing a significant bug. People drop randomly and aren't permitted to rejoin. Suddenly one person can't hear another. It's frustrating.

Some of the design choices are also maddening. The four player colors are dark blue, light blue, dark red, and light red. Why?! Why not orange, purple, green, yellow? It's hard to tell the shades apart.

Fundamentally the game works, but I've been pretty disappointed.

reviews.review_title: Best Catan version since XBOX 360 days!
reviews.review_description: I used to have Catan for XBXOX 360 and it was fun to play. This VR version is even better and really immersive. Just like you are sitting down to play with friends on a real board. The different environments are excellent. Graphics and animation excellent. Gameplay and controls are easy enough. Very polished game. I hope the developers will also come out with the expansions. The only slight negative, is that the player colors like Blue/White and Orange/Red are hard to distinguish as different. They need to change the orange player to green or another color, and white make pure white and not light blue. Also another thing not quite obvious, is in the settings, you can change the height and distance of the table. I wish other games had that capability. Plus it has 90Hz support.
I enjoy playing this game. I like to play it too veg after the kids are in bed. It would be amazing with the other expansion packs. I really wish there were other board games in the VR world.
I love catan but this could use a few tweaks. Red and orange are too similar. More variants would be nice, the ability to turn off trade, and to speed up gameplay/animation.

I had never played Catan before but appreciate a game of strategy. This is very enjoyable to play, though could easily be improved further :
- make player colours more different
- allow AI players to trade with player - I don't understand why they never opt for the player when both an AI and a player offer the same trade. Or maybe I'm doing it wrong
- I'd like to see my card totals updated _after_ the  animations of resources arriving
- make it more obvious when it's a different player's turn
Cheers
I love Catan , but I feel like it’s pretty boring now that I mostly play cities an knights. The graphics are fun and I love playing with friends in other places, but when will they update it?

Mostly a great game, a fun way to play one of my favorite games safely with friends who live far away.

Its great, until you're almost done with your match and your game glitches out. Happened to us every time we've played (5 times now) where one of us has been booted from the game or frozen. Thankfully, the others in the party can still finish the game, but definitely a bummer. 

Because of this, we discovered there's no way to re-join a game if you get kicked. There's a way to re-join the AI matches and join in online play, but not a friends list game that's currently going. So if you freeze, you just get to listen to your friends finish the game without you.

Its new so I imagine some of these kinks are still being worked out, and its still fun even so! There's a reason we keep playing even though it keeps happening haha. I'll update my review if things get updated.

Also, as others have said, the colors are very similar and can take some time differentiating. Seems a little unnecessary- i hope they update the color scheme soon.

Still worth it, fun backgrounds and characters. Cant wait to see what else comes to VR for tabletop!
I love this game! Love catan and it’s great in vr. Was wondering if there will be expansion updates.

My wife and I played a few times together on our 2 headsets and I played a match online. The game, imo is well made, with nice visuals of gameplay area and the vr rooms are nicely done. 
We both enjoyed it as expected!
Terrible catan experience. Don’t like how the board looks in VR at all. Stick with phone app.

reviews.review_title: Great game, but still needs work.
reviews.review_description:
If your a lover of the Catan board game series then stop right now and buy this game. Playing with lifelong friends, who live miles apart, on such an immersive platform is worth it right there. Once we picked up the controls and where everything was, it was like we were  all in the same place, playing a real Catan board game, except way better! 

That being said, the reason it received such a low score for me, and the only 2 reasons I could not give a five star review is simple. 

1) add expansion packs. Even if we have to buy them, I would do it in a heartbeat! Although the original game is very fun, and keeps us coming back for more, once you have played Seafarers and Cities and Knights, you can understand how unbelievably AWESOME this game would/could be. 

2) This game DOES NOT yet work 100% with app sharing! Probably a big reason why I ranked this game the way I did is because of this. We bought 2 Oculus Quest 2 headsets, fully thinking that we could just buy the game once, and play friends from all over the U.S. whenever we wanted. WRONG! App sharing give the other device the game, but they cannot join an online game with the primary account. Huge disappointment! I then made several attempts to contact the developer (to see if I was doing something wrong, or at least to let them know that app sharing doesn’t work 100%), and I got nothing but radio silence. I had to buy the game twice for it to allow me to have both headsets play the same online game, at the same time.

All that said, I hope the developers fix this problem, even though I already bought the game twice. They could make it up to me by adding expansions.
